docs.title: SlideMaker
docs.text: slidemaker is a Python library for generating slide decks from PowerPoint templates. Built on python-pptx, it exposes one high-level class (SlideBuilder) that handles template loading, slide cloning, content population, style resolution, and final deck assembly.

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
• src/slidemaker/core.py: low-level text, shape, and slide utilities.
  • src/slidemaker/anchors.py: anchor map loading and validation.
  • src/slidemaker/cli.py: SlideBuilder high-level API.
  • src/slidemaker/main.py: CLI entry point.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
from slidemaker import SlideBuilder

sb = SlideBuilder("my_template.pptx")
sb.add_slide("Introduction", items=["Point A", "Point B"])
sb.add_slide("Code Example", code="print('hello')")
sb.save("output.pptx")

See Getting Started for setup and CLI for command-line usage.

docs.title: Changelog
docs.text:
The canonical changelog is maintained in the repository root:

  • CHANGELOG.md

Releases are generated by semantic-release during CI release workflows.

docs.title: slidemaker generate-anchor-map
docs.text:
Generate an anchor map YAML file from a PowerPoint template. The anchor map defines where SlideBuilder writes content in each slide layout.

python -m slidemaker.main generate-anchor-map \
  --template my_template.pptx \
  --out template_anchor_map.yaml

Options:

  • --template: path to the .pptx template (required)
  • --out: output YAML path (default template_anchor_map.yaml)
  • --default-template-page: base template page index (default 5)
  • --include-shape-catalog / --no-include-shape-catalog: include full shape names in output

docs.title: slidemaker build (planned)
docs.text: Build a deck from a YAML lesson spec (not yet implemented).

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: Contributions are welcome.

docs.title: Setup
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/mediatoolbox-org/slidemaker.git
cd slidemaker
mamba env create --file conda/dev.yaml
conda activate slidemaker
poetry config virtualenvs.create false
poetry install --with dev

docs.title: Local Checks
docs.text:
makim tests.unit
makim tests.linter
makim docs.build

docs.title: Pull Requests
docs.text:
• keep changes focused
  • include tests for behavior changes
  • update docs when user-facing behavior changes
  • keep Python 3.10+ compatibility

docs.title: Release Model
docs.text: This repository uses semantic-release. Follow conventional commit style in PR titles/messages.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: This guide sets up slidemaker for local development.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Conda or Mamba
  • Poetry

docs.title: Setup
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/mediatoolbox-org/slidemaker.git
cd slidemaker
mamba env create --file conda/dev.yaml
conda activate slidemaker
poetry config virtualenvs.create false
poetry install --with dev

docs.title: Verify Installation
docs.text: python -c "from slidemaker import SlideBuilder; print('OK')"

docs.title: Run Example
docs.text:
from slidemaker import SlideBuilder

sb = SlideBuilder("my_template.pptx")
sb.add_slide("Introduction", items=["Point A", "Point B"])
sb.save("test_deck.pptx")

docs.title: Local Quality Gates
docs.text:
makim tests.unit
makim tests.linter
makim docs.build

docs.title: Anchor Maps
docs.text: Anchor maps define where SlideBuilder writes content in a PowerPoint template. They remove hardcoded shape dependencies from code and make templates editable through config.

docs.title: File Format
docs.text:
Typical file: template_anchor_map.yaml

version: 1
default-template-page: 5
title-slide:
  title-group: Group 7
  subtitle-group: Group 4
title-groups:
  1: Group 7
  2: Group 3
  3: Group 4
checkpoints:
  textbox-names:
    - TextBox 34
    - TextBox 35
areas:
  objectives-bullets:
    left: 0.9
    top: 3.6
    width: 13.0
    height: 6.5

docs.title: Key Sections
docs.text:
• title-slide: maps groups used by add_title.
  • title-groups: maps title group per template page.
  • areas: inches-based boxes for content placement.
  • checkpoints.textbox-names: maps the prebuilt checklist rows.
  • remove-shapes: lists placeholder shapes to remove before populating.

docs.title: Generating an Anchor Map
docs.text:
python -m slidemaker.main generate-anchor-map \
  --template my_template.pptx \
  --out template_anchor_map.yaml \
  --include-shape-catalog

This inspects every slide layout in the template and writes shape names, groups, and suggested area coordinates.
